\tzpentry{ID5505}{Magnetic Flux Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5505 introduces Magnetic Flux Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \lap \Phi(\mathbf{x},t)=4\pi G\,\rho_{\mathrm{eff}}(\mathbf{x},t), \label{eq:poisson_emergent} \end{equation}
